frontmatter.title: Make Three To Throw Away: Frontiers in Homotopical Proof Assistants
frontmatter.meta: Workshop on the Implementation of Type Systems (keynote)

mainmatter.p: For six years, I have served as the founder and technical leader of the RedPRL Development Team which has produced three interactive proof assistants for variants of cubical type theory: RedPRL, redtt, and cooltt. I will share several lessons that we have learned about the design and implementation of homotopical proof assistants along this journey. This talk discusses joint work with personhttps://cs.cmu.edu/~cangiuli/C. Angiuli, personhttps://staff.math.su.se/evan.cavallo/E. Cavallo, personhttps://www.favonia.org/Favonia, personhttp://cs.cmu.edu/~rwh/R. Harper, and personhttps://totbwf.github.ioR. Mullanix.
